articles.title: Amazon shareholders tells company to consider adding Bitcoin to its treasury
articles.description: Amazon shareholders are requesting the company to consider adding Bitcoin to its balance sheet as a way to protect against inflation. This follows a trend where companies, including Microsoft and Tesla, are exploring Bitcoin as an asset. Amazon’s shareholders are asking the company to consider adding Bitcoin to its balance sheet, following in the footsteps […]

articles.title: US Treasury Calls Bitcoin 'Digital Gold,' Highlights Stablecoin Growth
articles.description: US Treasury acknowledges Bitcoin as 'digital gold' and highlights stablecoins' rising role in linking traditional finance to blockchain innovation.

articles.title: Is Cardano (ADA) in Danger of Being Overvalued? Key Indicators Raise Concerns
articles.description: According to historical data, Cardano (ADA) may be approaching overvalued territory. This comes after an impressive 180% price increase over the last 30 days. For some investors, the timing might seem premature, especially with the much-anticipated altcoin season just beginning. However, on-chain indicators suggest that ADA might face a correction before establishing new highs. Cardano Metrics...

articles.title: Cardano Foundation X account hacked, scam links posted, then removed
articles.description: The Cardano Foundation joins a long list of entities falling victim to X account hacks, including the Securities and Exchange Commission.

articles.title: Microsoft Set to Vote on Adding Bitcoin to Its Portfolio This Week
articles.description: Microsoft's shareholders are preparing for a pivotal decision on December 10 regarding the company’s potential investment in Bitcoin. The post Microsoft Set to Vote on Adding Bitcoin to Its Portfolio This Week appeared first on Cryptodnes.

articles.title: Cardano Foundation X account under attack, hackers spread misinformation about SEC lawsuit
articles.description: Cardano Foundation's official X social media account has been under attack, with hackers posting false information about a purported SEC lawsuit against the organization and promoting a fraudulent token.The hackers first claimed that Cardano was releasing a new token on the Solana blockchain, which was soon discovered to be a scam token. At the time of reporting, the post that advertised this...

articles.title: Breaking News: Cardano X/Twitter Account Compromised, False Announcement Circulates
articles.description: The official Cardano X/Twitter account has been compromised, with a fake tweet claiming a SEC lawsuit against Cardano and stating the cessation of $ADA token support. The tweet, which was flagged as fraudulent, falsely claimed that the Cardano Foundation would cease support for $ADA in response to the alleged legal action. False Cardano Announcement Sparks Immediate Confusion The fraudulent...

articles.title: Hacked Cardano Foundation X account posts fake token, false SEC lawsuit notice
articles.description: The relatively sophisticated scam attempt had some Cardano users trading the token, which saw $500,000 in trading volume.

articles.title: Microsoft shareholders to make Bitcoin investment decision on December 10
articles.description: Microsoft shareholders are set to decide on the firm’s Bitcoin investment stance on December 10. The digital asset’s cruise to $100k has been fueled by support from the United States President-elect Donald Trump and Tesla CEO and billionaire Elon Musk. However, Microsoft has yet to commit. The deadline for the decision will come later this […]
